positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene, silhouette style, featuring stylized overlapping trees and winding pathways against a dramatic twilight sky. The composition should be centrally balanced, with negative space enhancing the depth. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, forest green, and soft mustard yellow. The lines must be clean and sharp, perfect for screen printing on fabric. Aspect ratio square.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, text, logo, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines, excessive detail, photorealism
